Author: Valdarix Games
Title: The Day AI Finally Understood My Terrible Code Comments
Text:
Member-only story
The Day AI Finally Understood My Terrible Code Comments
How OpenAI’s Codex transforms ChatGPT from a coding companion into a full-fledged engineering partner
It was 1AM, and I was having another heated argument with ChatGPT about why my function wasn’t working. You know the drill — paste in some code, get a suggestion that looks perfect, implement it, watch it fail spectacularly, then spend another twenty minutes explaining what you actually meant. I’d been doing this dance with AI coding assistants for years, always feeling like I was teaching a brilliant but literal-minded intern who couldn’t quite grasp the bigger picture.
Then, last week, everything changed.
OpenAI launched Codex, a cloud-based software engineering agent that transforms ChatGPT from a helpful coding companion into something far more powerful OpenAI launches Codex, an AI coding agent, in ChatGPT | TechCrunch. This isn’t just another incremental update or a fancy wrapper around GPT — it’s a fundamental shift in how we interact with AI for software development.
Beyond the Chat Window
Here’s what makes Codex different: it doesn’t just talk about code; it lives in code. Each task runs in its own cloud sandbox environment, preloaded with your repository…
